HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

src Directory Reference
Directory dependency graph for src:

Files

 Bsp3D.cpp
 Implementation of a minimal 3D BSP tree for triangle meshes.
 
 casimir.cpp
 Main entry point for the HELIOS Casimir force routine.
 
 Dipole.cpp
 Implementation of the Dipole incident source.
 
 Domain.cpp
 Implementation of the Domain base class.
 
 DomainHom3D.cpp
 Implementation of the homogeneous 3D domain.
 
 DomainHom3DPer.cpp
 Implementation of the homogeneous, periodically replicated 3D domain.
 
 DomainLayered3D.cpp
 Implementation of the layered 3D domain.
 
 Gaussian.cpp
 Implementation of the paraxial Gaussian beam incident field.
 
 globals.cpp
 Definitions for global constants declared in globals.h.
 
 GreenF.cpp
 Implementation of the GreenF base class.
 
 GreenFHom3D.cpp
 Implementation of the 3D Green's Function class in a homogeneous background.
 
 GreenFHom3DPer.cpp
 Implementation of the periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function base.
 
 GreenFHom3DPer2D.cpp
 Implementation of the 2D-periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function.
 
 GreenFLayered3D.cpp
 Implementation of the 3D Green's Function class in a layered background.
 
 IncidentField.cpp
 Minimal implementation pieces for IncidentField.
 
 JobParser.cpp
 Implementation of the lightweight tag parser used for job files.
 
 LayeredMediaUtils.cpp
 Implementation for the LayeredMediaUtils class.
 
 main.cpp
 This is the main file for the HELIOS program.
 
 mainpp.cpp
 This is the main file for the HELIOS program, specifically the post-processing portion.
 
 maintable.cpp
 Command-line utility to generate, read, and write periodic error-function lookup tables used in the SIE solver.
 
 mathFunctions.cpp
 
 PlaneWave.cpp
 Implementation for the PlaneWave class.
 
 quadrature.cpp
 Definitions of Dunavant (triangle) and Gauss–Legendre (1D) quadrature rules.
 
 RWGFun.cpp
 Implementation for the RWGFun class.
 
 SIEForm.cpp
 Implementation for the SIEForm class.
 
 SIEFormPMCHW.cpp
 Implementation for the SIEFormPMCHW class.
 
 SimJob.cpp
 Implementation for the SimJob class.
 
 SingCancellation.cpp
 Implementation of the singularity-cancellation paired quadrature builders.
 
 SingSub.cpp
 Implementation of exact edge/surface integrals and K1–K4 kernels.
 
 SommerfeldIntegrator.cpp
 Implementation of SommerfeldIntegrator: contour construction, integrand assembly, QUADPACK integration, and interpolation packing.
 
 SurfaceMesh.cpp
 Implementation of SurfaceMesh mesh I/O and utilities.
 
 Triangle.cpp
 Implementation of Triangle geometry caching and utilities.
 
 TriQuadPol.cpp
 Polar-quadrature assembly about an observation point on a triangle.
